result.summary: Found 2 visually broken layout issues: content is clipped on the right side, and the fixed bottom nav overlaps the page content.

issues.description: The game grid overflows the viewport on the right, leaving the rightmost cards partially cut off in both the 'Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the grid to fit the mobile width, reduce column count, or enable proper horizontal scrolling with visible padding so cards are fully accessible.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar covers the lower portion of the page, partially obscuring the bottom row of game tiles.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding/margin to the content area equal to the nav height, or make the bottom nav non-overlapping so content remains fully visible.
